name: celeborn-monorepo
description: Celeborn workspace root — shares @celeborn/board-ui with board/ (the local board viewer).
comment-overrides: Single source of truth for security pins (the postcss 8.5.15 pin). npm only honors `overrides` at the workspace root, so board/ installs from this root install and inherits the pin.
comment-react: Pinned at the root to board/'s exact version so npm hoists a SINGLE react/react-dom that satisfies @celeborn/board-ui's peerDependency (>=19) and dedupes the per-app copies. Without this, npm auto-installs a newer react at the root to fill the peer, leaving two React instances in the tree (the 'invalid hook call' hazard). Keep in lockstep with board/.
